## Summary

Describe the change and the source used.

## Checklist

- [ ] Source revision, author, license, checksum, and modification status are recorded.
- [ ] SVG contains no scripts, external resources, fonts, or embedded raster images.
- [ ] `npm run build`, `npm run docs`, and `npm test` pass.
- [ ] Light, dark, and patterned QA contact sheets were reviewed.
- [ ] Published IDs and paths remain stable, or this is explicitly a major-version change.
